title: Cosmos
description: A highly configurable mod to make stars better.
body:
# Cosmos
This mod is all about enhancing the visuals of stars in a vanilla friendly, and highly configurable way.

![Night sky with Cosmos and Better Clouds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/717a96958d0e20118babe1cc9ce273ae21c25d3a.gif)

## Stars
---
Stars are now highly configurable: almost everything about them, including the texture, is customizable. The list of configurable features includes:
- Texture
- Count
- Brightness multiplier
- Size range
- Twinkle frequency
- List of colors
- Color alpha range (opacity)
- North star toggle*


*While the north star picks a northern star to replace, if the count is low enough to where there are no northern stars there is a possibility that no north star will appear even with the option turned on
